title: AI Revolution: Transforming Governance and Beyond
description: Vice President C P Radhakrishnan discusses the transformative role of artificial intelligence in governance and various sectors. Highlighting initiatives like Bhashini and India's AI leadership, he emphasizes AI's potential to ensure inclusive growth and development across health, agriculture, and more. Radhakrishnan views AI as both a technological and human revolution.
content:
Vice President C P Radhakrishnan has emphasized the role of artificial intelligence as a transformative force in governance and various sectors, speaking at the 5th Dr Rajendra Prasad Memorial Lecture on 'AI for Good Governance'.

title: AI Revolution in Business Education: Stride School Leads the Way
description: Stride School of Business, India's first AI-native BBA program, integrates artificial intelligence into every aspect of its curriculum. This approach prepares students for modern business challenges where AI plays a critical role in operations. The program emphasizes real-world application, bridging the gap between academic theory and industry demands.

title: AI ruling prompts warnings from US lawyers: Your chats could be used against you
description: As people increasingly turn to artificial intelligence for advice, some U.S. lawyers are telling their clients not to treat AI chatbots like trusted confidants when their freedom or legal liability is on the line.
content:
